---
title: "test_api_precedence.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/crucible/test_api_precedence.py"
loc: 59
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.72
style_score: 3.44
intel_score: 8.18
overall_score: 5.76
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestAPIKeyPrecedence, test_bridge_unsets_env_vars_when_no_api_key.

## Interaction Protocol
Import TestAPIKeyPrecedence and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge](file://src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `TestAPIKeyPrecedence`
- `test_bridge_unsets_env_vars_when_no_api_key`
- `test_bridge_sets_env_vars_when_api_key_provided`
- `test_uplink_fallback_logic`
- `test_uplink_no_fallback_if_init_key_provided`
